description_long: This object consists of two nearly identical short swords or large daggers, each featuring a broad, double-edged blade with a pronounced central ridge and a pointed tip. The blades are metallic with a slightly reflective, silvery finish and subtle light streaks running along their length. Each sword has a prominent crossguard with angular, claw-like extensions, rendered in a muted tan or bronze color. The handles are wrapped in a textured material, one in a reddish-brown and the other in a darker brown, providing a secure grip and ending in a rounded pommel. The overall design is robust and functional, with a slight fantasy or historical flair, suitable for display or use in a dramatic urban scenario. No visible ornamentation or sheath is present, and the construction suggests durability and practical use.
description: A pair of broad, double-edged short swords with metallic blades, angular crossguards, and wrapped handles in brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing both swords side by side, highlighting the full blade shape, crossguards, and handle wrappings.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thinness of the blades and the alignment of the handles, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the backs of the blades, crossguards, and handle wrappings.
description_view_3: Opposite edge-on view, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blades and the stacked handles.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped in leather, visible grip texture, rounded pommel
